name: kova
description: Kova — Protect APIs from AI Agents behind x402 paywalls on Stellar

scripts.publish:client: pnpm --filter @onkova/sdk-client build && cd packages/sdk-client && npm publish --access public
scripts.publish:server: pnpm --filter @onkova/sdk-server build && cd packages/sdk-server && npm publish --access public
scripts.publish:all: pnpm run publish:client && pnpm run publish:server
